description: Create a GitHub Actions pipeline that runs on push to master, hotfix branches, and tags matching v*, as well as on pull requests. The pipeline consists of two jobs: tests and release. The tests job runs on a matrix of OS (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest), Python versions (3.9, 3.8, 3.7), and configuration (Release, Debug), with specific exclusions and inclusions. It checks out the code, sets up Python, builds the project, runs C++ and Python tests, generates documentation on Ubuntu, and builds and uploads a package on Windows and Ubuntu for Release configuration. The release job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the tests job, and uploads the package to PyPI if the workflow is triggered by a tag.
